tasks.title: Add event image field and default asset path
tasks.objective: Represent an optional event image in the domain and default it to the attached cohort illustration when creators do not provide one.
authority: Use URL/path-based image support for the MVP unless binary upload is explicitly requested.
Keep the default image local and served by the app.
Do not add external storage dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Event objects include an image field.
Creating a cohort without an image assigns the default image.
Creating a cohort with a valid custom image URL/path preserves that image.
Invalid image values are rejected or normalized according to existing validation style.
Persistence schema metadata documents the image field.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop once image data is stored consistently and defaulted for new events.

tasks.title: Render event images across MVP surfaces
tasks.objective: Display event images in the public feed, event detail page, and relevant dashboard rows with responsive styling.
authority: Keep layout responsive and avoid oversized decorative cards.
Use the event image as meaningful event content.
acceptance_criteria: Feed cards show the event image or default image.
Detail page shows the event image prominently without hiding core action controls.
Dashboard rows include image treatment or intentionally omit it with documented reason.
Images have stable dimensions and alt text.
verification: Browser screenshot check of feed and detail pages.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop once image rendering is visible and verified on core MVP surfaces.

tasks.title: Add creator image input
tasks.objective: Let creators provide an image URL/path when creating a cohort while keeping the default image path when the field is blank.
authority: Use a simple URL/path input for the MVP.
Do not implement binary upload unless the user explicitly expands scope.
acceptance_criteria: Create form includes an optional event image field.
Blank field uses the default image.
Custom image value is saved and rendered.
Validation errors are shown in the existing form error area.
verification: Browser smoke test create with blank and custom image values.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop once creators can optionally provide image data and default behavior remains intact.
